required_skills: Growth marketing and full-funnel acquisition strategy
A/B testing and conversion rate optimization (CRO)
Product analytics and user behavior analysis
Paid digital advertising across search and social channels (SEM, paid social)
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and organic growth strategies
Email marketing automation and lifecycle marketing
Data-driven experimentation design and statistical analysis
SQL for funnel analysis and cohort reporting
preferred_skills: Experience with viral loops, referral mechanics, and product-led growth (PLG) strategies
Familiarity with B2B demand generation and account-based marketing (ABM)
Knowledge of growth modeling — building bottoms-up growth forecasts and scenario plans
Exposure to influencer marketing, affiliate programs, or partnership-led growth channels
Understanding of mobile growth — App Store Optimization (ASO) and UA on mobile platforms
Experience with landing page design and no-code tools for rapid experiment deployment
Prior startup growth experience where channels were built from zero to measurable scale
responsibilities: Design and execute growth experiments across acquisition, activation, retention, and referral funnels, using a rigorous test-and-learn methodology
Build and manage paid acquisition campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads, optimizing for CAC, ROAS, and downstream LTV targets
Conduct deep funnel analysis using Mixpanel or Amplitude to identify conversion drop-offs and prioritize high-impact optimization opportunities
Develop and execute SEO content and link-building strategies to drive sustainable, compounding organic traffic growth
Own email and lifecycle marketing workflows in tools like Braze or HubSpot, designing segmented campaigns that improve activation and retention rates
Instrument and maintain the marketing analytics stack, ensuring clean event tracking, attribution modeling, and accurate funnel reporting via Segment
Build and maintain a growth experimentation backlog, scoring opportunities with ICE or RICE frameworks and managing end-to-end test execution
Collaborate with product and engineering teams to implement in-product growth loops, onboarding optimizations, and referral mechanics
Analyze cohort-level retention data to identify leading indicators of churn and design targeted interventions to improve long-term user engagement
Develop bottoms-up growth models and channel-level forecasts to project user and revenue growth across acquisition scenarios
